name: @whchi/your-legion
description: Plugin-first OpenCode multi-agent system inspired by oh-my-openagent

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/server.js && bun build src/cli.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/cli.js && cp legionaries.yaml dist/legionaries.yaml && cp -R src/custom-agents dist/custom-agents && cp -R src/domains dist/domains
